description: Mesari Apparel is your ultimate destination for high-quality fashion. We offer a curated selection of stylish ready-to-wear clothing alongside premium custom apparel services. Whether you need everyday essentials, streetwear, or personalized custom t-shirts and uniforms for your team, we bring your unique style to life with top-notch fabrics and expert craftsmanship.
address: Perum BCA Pesona Jadi, Blok 6.C No.06, Banjar Anyar, Kediri, Tabanan Regency, Bali 82123
